body:
Pure refactor: pulls small pieces of `invoice.py` and `pager.py` out into named helpers so each function reads top-to-bottom without nested conditionals. No behavior change — same inputs produce the same outputs, just easier to unit test the pieces in isolation going forward.

- `invoice.py`: extract `_reset_balance`, `_late_fee`; rename `load_pending` -> `fetch_pending` to match the `save_pending` naming
- `pager.py`: extract `_has_more`, `_clamp`

No tests changed since behavior is unchanged.
title: refactor: extract helpers in invoice/pager, no behavior change
